llm.description: Call and use variables and prompts to generate responses.

code.description: Code node for running custom JavaScript or Python code.

plugin.description: Tool node for calling specific plugin tools to perform tasks.

condition.description: Connect multiple downstream branches. Only the branch that meets the set condition will be executed.
condition.pleaseSelectVariableToCheck: Please select a variable to check
condition.ifBranchMustBeConnected: "If" branch must be connected to a node
condition.elseBranchMustBeConnected: "Else" branch must be connected to a node
condition.elseIfBranchMustBeConnected: "Else If" branch must be connected to a node
condition.branchesMustBeConnected: The following branches must be connected to nodes: {{types}}

loop.description: Repeat a series of tasks by setting iteration count and logic.
loop.loopCountVariableNotFound: Loop count referenced variable not found
loop.loopCountMustBePositive: Loop count must be greater than 0
loop.loopCountMustBeNumber: Loop count must be a number
loop.loopArrayConfigCannotBeEmpty: Loop array configuration cannot be empty
loop.atLeastOneArrayVariable: At least one array variable is required
loop.arrayVariableNameCannotBeEmpty: Array variable name cannot be empty
loop.intermediateVarNotFound: Intermediate variable "{{field}}" referenced variable not found
loop.arrayVariableValueCannotBeEmpty: Array variable "{{field}}" value cannot be empty
loop.arrayVariableNotFound: Array variable "{{field}}" referenced variable not found
loop.arrayVariableMustBeArray: Array variable "{{field}}" must be an array type
loop.arrayVariableCannotBeEmptyArray: Array variable "{{field}}" cannot be an empty array
loop.loopBodyMustContainStartAndEnd: Loop body must contain start and end nodes
loop.loopBodyMustHaveCompletePath: Loop body must have a complete path from start to end

input.description: Input node for pausing during workflow execution and waiting for user input.

output.description: Output node for outputting intermediate or final results during workflow execution.

start.description: Starting node of the workflow, used to set the information needed to start the workflow.

end.description: Final node of the workflow, used to return the result information after the workflow runs.
end.outputConfiguredNote: Output Content is configured. The workflow will only return the response field. To return output variables, please clear the Output Content configuration.

questioner.description: Questioner node for asking questions to users and collecting answers.
questioner.maxQuestionsDescription: Set maximum number of questions, range 1-10
questioner.maxResponseRequired: Max response count cannot be empty
questioner.mustBePositiveInteger: Must be an integer greater than 0 and not greater than 10

intent.description: Intent recognition node for matching different intents based on different user inputs.
intent.atLeastOneIntent: At least one intent is required
intent.intentMustBeConnected: Intent "{{name}}" must be connected to a node
intent.intentsMustBeConnected: The following intents must be connected to nodes: {{names}}
intent.otherIntentMustBeConnected: Other intent port must be connected to a node

textEditor.description: Text editor node for processing and transforming text content in workflows.

variableMerge.description: Workflow variable aggregation node for aggregating variables from multiple groups.
variableMerge.configCannotBeEmpty: Variable merge configuration cannot be empty
variableMerge.atLeastOneGroup: At least one variable group must be added
variableMerge.groupAtLeastOneVariable: Group "{{name}}" must contain at least one variable
variableMerge.firstNonNull: Return the first non-null value from each group
variableMerge.tooltipType: Variable type defaults to the first variable's type in the group
variableMerge.noVariables: No variables, click the button above to add
variableMerge.noGroups: No groups, click the button below to add

continue.title: Continue
continue.description: Continue node for skipping the current iteration and continuing to the next iteration in a loop.

break.title: Break
break.description: Break node for immediately exiting a loop.

variable.description: Used to reset the value of a loop variable for the next iteration
variable.title: Variable
variable.atLeastOneAssignment: At least one assignment operation is required
variable.leftVariableTypeEmpty: Left variable type cannot be empty
variable.leftVariableMustBeRef: Left variable must be a reference type
variable.leftRefPathEmpty: Left variable reference path cannot be empty
variable.leftRefPathMustContain: Left variable reference path must contain node and variable name
variable.leftRefPathNoEmpty: Left variable reference path cannot contain empty values
variable.rightValueTypeEmpty: Right value type cannot be empty

validate.variableNamePattern: Variable name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and must start with a letter

input.dragUploadText: Drag to upload or click to browse
input.fileWillUploadAtRuntime: File will be uploaded when workflow runs

editor.defaultValueIfNotProvided: Default value if parameter is not provided
editor.helpLLMUnderstandProperty: Help LLM to understand the property
editor.completeCurrentParameterFirst: Please complete the current parameter settings before adding a new one
editor.parameterNameAlreadyExists: Parameter name "{{name}}" already exists, please use a different name

historyPanel.title: History Versions
historyPanel.subtitle: View and manage workflow versions
historyPanel.selectWorkflowPrompt: Please select a workflow to view version history.
historyPanel.restoreConfirmMessage: Restoring will overwrite the latest workflow content
historyPanel.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete version {{version}}? This cannot be undone

publishDialog.versionFormatIncorrect: Version format is incorrect, please use v1.2.3 format
publishDialog.descriptionMinLength: Description must be at least 5 characters
publishDialog.publishFailedRetry: Publish failed, please try again later

testrunPanel.completeInputToContinue: Complete the following input to continue test run

testDebugPanel.missingSpaceId: Missing space ID, please ensure workspace information is correct
testDebugPanel.missingNodeId: Missing node ID, please select the node again
testDebugPanel.completeInputToContinue: Complete the following input to continue test run

nodeInputPanel.completeInputToContinue: Complete the following input to continue execution

debugPanel.noInputOutputData: This component has no input/output data
debugPanel.clearedSelection: Selection cleared, please select execution time again
debugPanel.missingLogSummaryDescription: The debug tree requires logSummary data to display component execution information, but none was found.
debugPanel.name: Name

formModel.loadFailed: Failed to load models, please retry
formModel.modelNotExists: Model does not exist, please reselect

formPrompt.unlinkConfirm: Confirm to unlink prompt "{{promptName}}-{{version}}" from workflow node? This action cannot be undone.

pluginSelector.supportMultipleSelection: Support selecting multiple tools from multiple plugins
